allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/suggest-department-tasks -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"departmentName":"Marketing","userDescription":"Digital marketing team for a retail chain"}' -o /tmp/mk.json)

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/tmp/mk.json'\); console.log\('CATEGORIES:', JSON.stringify\(d.categories\)\); console.log\('TASKS:'\); \(d.tasks||[]\).forEach\(t=>console.log\('  -', t.name, '=>', t.category, '['+t.pattern+']'\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/suggest-department-tasks -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"departmentName":"Marketing","userDescription":"Digital marketing team for a retail chain"}')
